nasb.text: And He said, “How shall we picture the kingdom of God, or by what parable shall we present it?

esv.text: And he said, “With what can we compare the kingdom of God, or what parable shall we use for it?

cnv.text: 又說：“我們要把　神的國比作甚麼呢？我們可以用甚麼比喻來形容它呢？

ccb.text: 耶稣说：“我们拿什么比作上帝的国呢？用什么比喻来解释呢？

csbs.text: 耶稣又说：“我们把神的国比做什么呢？用什么比喻来表明它呢？
